items.title: code-review-graph
items.description: Local-first code intelligence graph for MCP and CLI. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so AI coding tools read only what matters, with benchmarked context reductions on reviews and large-repo workflows.
items.description_zh: MCP 和 CLI 的本地优先代码智能图。构建代码库的持久映射，以便 AI 编码工具仅读取重要内容，并在评论和大型存储库工作流程上进行基准上下文缩减。

items.title: jcode
items.description: The most intelligent agent harness for code
items.description_zh: 最智能的代码代理工具

items.title: OmniRoute
items.description: Never stop coding. Free MIT AI gateway: one endpoint, 268+ providers (50+ free), 500+ models — Claude, GPT, Gemini, Kimi K3, GLM, DeepSeek. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline & Copilot. Quota-aware auto-fallback, RTK+Caveman compression saves 15-95% tokens, MCP/A2A, multimodal, Desktop/PWA. Built by 500+ contributors.
items.description_zh: 永远不要停止编码。免费 MIT AI 网关：一个端点、268 多个提供商（50 多个免费）、500 多个模型 — Claude、GPT、Gemini、Kimi K3、GLM、DeepSeek。适用于 Claude Code、Codex、Cursor、Cline 和 Copilot。配额感知自动回退、RTK+Caveman 压缩可节省 15-95% 的令牌、MCP/A2A、多模式、桌面/PWA。由 500 多名贡献者构建。

items.title: ai-engineering-from-scratch
items.description: Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.
items.description_zh: 学习它。建造它。寄给别人。

items.title: agency-agents
items.description: A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.
items.description_zh: 触手可及的完整人工智能机构 - 从前端向导到 Reddit 社区忍者，从奇思妙想的注入者到现实检查者。每个代理都是一位具有个性、流程和经过验证的可交付成果的专业专家。

items.title: ktransformers
items.description: A Flexible Framework for Experiencing Heterogeneous LLM Inference/Fine-tune Optimizations
items.description_zh: 用于体验异构 LLM 推理/微调优化的灵活框架

items.title: voicebox
items.description: The open-source AI voice studio. Clone, dictate, create.
items.description_zh: 开源人工智能语音工作室。克隆、指令、创造。

items.title: cognee
items.description: Cognee is the open-source AI memory platform for agents. Give your AI agents persistent long-term memory across sessions with a self-hosted knowledge graph engine.
items.description_zh: Cognee 是面向代理的开源人工智能记忆平台。通过自托管知识图引擎，为您的人工智能代理提供跨会话的持久长期记忆。

items.title: lingbot-map
items.description: A feed-forward 3D foundation model for reconstructing scenes from streaming data
items.description_zh: 用于从流数据重建场景的前馈 3D 基础模型

items.title: open-seo
items.description: Open source alternative to Semrush and Ahrefs
items.description_zh: Semrush 和 Ahrefs 的开源替代方案

items.title: kimi-cli
items.description: Kimi Code CLI is your next CLI agent.
items.description_zh: Kimi Code CLI 是您的下一个 CLI 代理。

items.title: AstrBot
items.description: AI Agent Assistant & development framework that integrates lots of IM platforms, LLMs, plugins and AI feature, and can be your openclaw alternative. ✨
items.description_zh: AI Agent Assistant & 开发框架，集成了大量 IM 平台、LLM、插件和 AI 功能，可以成为您的 openclaw 替代方案。 ✨

items.title: fastmcp
items.description: 🚀 The fast, Pythonic way to build MCP servers and clients.
items.description_zh: 🚀 构建 MCP 服务器和客户端的快速、Python 方式。

items.title: wigolo
items.description: The go-to web for your AI coding agent — local-first search, fetch, crawl & research over MCP. No API keys, no cloud, $0/query. Public beta.
items.description_zh: AI 编码代理的首选网络 — 通过 MCP 进行本地优先搜索、获取、爬网和研究。没有 API 密钥，没有云，每次查询 0 美元。公开测试版。

items.title: topcoat
items.description: A batteries-included framework for building web apps
items.description_zh: 用于构建 Web 应用程序的包含电池的框架
